messages.body:
Execute Group 6 of wish "tauri-docs-agent". Your full context is in the system prompt. Read the wish at /home/genie/.genie/worktrees/rlmx/rlmx/.genie/wishes/tauri-docs-agent/WISH.md if needed. Implement all deliverables, run validation, and report completion.

2. Run: genie send 'Group 6 complete. <summary>' --to team-lead
